TRIAL RESET TO JUN-04-1999 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF MAY-24-1999 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT HISTORIC RESTAURANTS INC. DBA JACK'S RESTAURANT

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BOECHLER, DONNA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HISTORIC RESTAURANTS INC. REDINGER ARE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
